ENTRY.name: CLASSICAL_AGE
ENTRY.STRING: The game time at which a nation reached the Classical Age.

ENTRY.name: MEDIEVAL_AGE
ENTRY.STRING: The game time at which a nation reached the Medieval Age.

ENTRY.name: GUNPOWDER_AGE
ENTRY.STRING: The game time at which a nation reached the Gunpowder Age.

ENTRY.name: ENLIGHTENMENT_AGE
ENTRY.STRING: The game time at which a nation reached the Enlightenment Age.

ENTRY.name: INDUSTRIAL_AGE
ENTRY.STRING: The game time at which a nation reached the Industrial Age.

ENTRY.name: MODERN_AGE
ENTRY.STRING: The game time at which a nation reached the Modern Age.

ENTRY.name: INFORMATION_AGE
ENTRY.STRING: The game time at which a nation reached the Information Age.

ENTRY.name: LIBRARY_RESEARCH
ENTRY.STRING: The total amount of Library research other than age advances conducted by a nation.

ENTRY.name: MISC_RESEARCH
ENTRY.STRING: The total amount of non-Library research conducted by a nation.

ENTRY.name: UNIT_UPGRADES
ENTRY.STRING: The total number of unit upgrades researched by a nation.

ENTRY.name: COMBAT_SCORE
ENTRY.STRING: A nation's combat score is 20% of the total resource value of all enemy units and buildings destroyed.

ENTRY.name: ARMY_SCORE
ENTRY.STRING: A nation's army score is 20% of the total resource value of its military units plus 20% of the total resource value of the unit upgrades it has researched.

ENTRY.name: TOTAL_SCORE
ENTRY.STRING: A nation's total score is the sum of its scores in the areas listed here.

ENTRY.name: TERRITORY_SCORE
ENTRY.STRING: A nation's territory score is 10 points for each 1% of the world's total landmass controlled.

ENTRY.name: BUILDINGS_SCORE
ENTRY.STRING: A nation's city score represents 20% of the total resource value of all its buildings (except Wonders) and civilian units.

ENTRY.name: ECONOMY_SCORE
ENTRY.STRING: A nation's economy score is 5% of the resources in its treasury in excess of what it started the game with (maximum of 100 points for each resource) plus 20% of its current income level for each resource (maximum of 200 points for each resource) plus 25 points for each rare resource controlled.

ENTRY.name: RESEARCH_SCORE
ENTRY.STRING: A nation's research score is 20% of the total resource value of all of its technology research.

ENTRY.name: WONDERS_SCORE
ENTRY.STRING: A nation's wonder score is 33% of the total resource value of all the Wonders it controls.

ENTRY.name: UNITS_BUILT
ENTRY.STRING: The total number of units built by a nation.

ENTRY.name: LARGEST_ARMY
ENTRY.STRING: The largest number of military units fielded by a nation at any one time.

ENTRY.name: UNITS_KILLED
ENTRY.STRING: The total number of enemy units killed by a nation.

ENTRY.name: UNITS_LOST
ENTRY.STRING: The total number of a nation's units lost in combat with an enemy nation.

ENTRY.name: BUILDINGS_BUILT
ENTRY.STRING: The total number of buildings constructed by a nation.

ENTRY.name: BUILDINGS_RAZED
ENTRY.STRING: The total number of enemy buildings razed by a nation.

ENTRY.name: BUILDINGS_LOST
ENTRY.STRING: The total number of a nation's buildings razed by an enemy nation.

ENTRY.name: CITIES_BUILT
ENTRY.STRING: The total number of cities built by a nation.

ENTRY.name: CITIES_CAPTURED
ENTRY.STRING: The total number of enemy cities captured by a nation.

ENTRY.name: CITIES_LOST
ENTRY.STRING: The total number of cities a nation lost to enemy nations.

ENTRY.name: TIMBER_COLLECTED
ENTRY.STRING: The total amount of Timber collected by a nation.

ENTRY.name: FOOD_COLLECTED
ENTRY.STRING: The total amount of Food collected by a nation.

ENTRY.name: WEALTH_COLLECTED
ENTRY.STRING: The total amount of Wealth collected by a nation.

ENTRY.name: KNOWLEDGE_COLLECTED
ENTRY.STRING: The total amount of Knowledge collected by a nation.

ENTRY.name: METAL_COLLECTED
ENTRY.STRING: The total amount of Metal collected by a nation.

ENTRY.name: OIL_COLLECTED
ENTRY.STRING: The total amount of Oil collected by a nation.

ENTRY.name: UNIQUE_RESOURCES
ENTRY.STRING: The number of rare resources controlled by a nation.

ENTRY.name: EXPLORATION_BONUSES
ENTRY.STRING: The total amount of resources a nation gained by exploring Ruins.

ENTRY.name: TRIBUTE_SENT
ENTRY.STRING: The total amount of resources a nation sent to other nations as gifts and tributes.

ENTRY.name: TRIBUTE_RECEIVED
ENTRY.STRING: The total amount of gifts and tributes a nation received from other nations.

ENTRY.name: MOST_CARAVANS
ENTRY.STRING: The greatest number of Caravans a nation had at any one time.

ENTRY.name: MOST_CITIZENS
ENTRY.STRING: The greatest number of Citizens a nation had at any one time.

ENTRY.name: MOST_MERCHANTS
ENTRY.STRING: The greatest number of Merchants a nation had at any one time.

ENTRY.name: MOST_SCHOLARS
ENTRY.STRING: The greatest number of Scholars a nation had at any one time.

ENTRY.name: MOST_CITIES
ENTRY.STRING: The greatest number of Cities a nation controlled at any one time.

ENTRY.name: MOST_TERRITORY
ENTRY.STRING: The greatest amount of territory a nation controlled at any one time.

ENTRY.name: MOST_WONDERS_BUILT
ENTRY.STRING: The number of Wonders a nation built.

ENTRY.name: MOST_WONDERS_HELD
ENTRY.STRING: The greatest number of Wonders a nation controlled at any one time.

ENTRY.name: MOST_FORTS_BUILT
ENTRY.STRING: The number of Forts a nation built.

ENTRY.name: UNITS_BRIBED
ENTRY.STRING: The number of units a nation bribed with Spies.

ENTRY.name: SURVIVAL_TO_FINISH
ENTRY.STRING: Shows which nations survived until the end of the game.

ENTRY.name: MOUSE_CLICKS
ENTRY.STRING: The number of times a player clicked the mouse button.

ENTRY.name: PLAYER_SPEED
ENTRY.STRING: The number of times per minute a player clicked the mouse button or used a hotkey.

ENTRY.name: HOTKEYS_PRESSED
ENTRY.STRING: The number of times a player used a hotkey.

ENTRY.name: TIME_ZOOMED_IN
ENTRY.STRING: The amount of time a player spent zoomed in.

ENTRY.name: TIME_ZOOMED_OUT
ENTRY.STRING: The amount of time a player spent zoomed out.

ENTRY.name: MOVE_ORDERS_ISSUED
ENTRY.STRING: The number of move orders issued by a player.

ENTRY.name: MVP_MARK
ENTRY.STRING: Indicates the most valuable player (on each team for a team game, or overall for a non-team game). A "weighted" score is used to determine the most valuable player; the combat score counts four times its normal value, the territory score counts double, and the City and Economy scores only count half. Winning players' MVP weights are doubled, and other players who survive until the end of the game have their scores increased by 25%.

ENTRY.name: BEST_MARK
ENTRY.STRING: Indicates the most extreme (usually "best") value in each category.

ENTRY.name: WON_MARK
ENTRY.STRING: Indicates a winning player.

ENTRY.name: INTERFACE_CLICKS
ENTRY.STRING: The number of mouse clicks in the interface by the player.

ENTRY.name: MINIMAP_CLICKS
ENTRY.STRING: The number of mouse clicks in the minimap by the player.

ENTRY.name: MAINMAP_CLICKS
ENTRY.STRING: The number of mouse clicks on the main map by the player.

ENTRY.name: CONTROL_GROUPS_ACTIVATED
ENTRY.STRING: The number of times the player has activated a control group.

ENTRY.name: CONTROL_GROUPS_FORMED
ENTRY.STRING: The number of control groups a player has created.

ENTRY.name: WINNERS_AREA
ENTRY.STRING: The list of the players that won the game.

ENTRY.name: MVP_AREA
ENTRY.STRING: Indicates the most valuable player (on each team for a team game, or overall for a non-team game). A "weighted" score is used to determine the most valuable player; the combat score counts four times its normal value, the territory score counts double, and the City and Economy scores only count half. Winning players' MVP weights are doubled, and other players who survive until the end of the game have their scores increased by 25%.

ENTRY.name: WINNER_SMALL_AREA
ENTRY.STRING: A player that won the game.

ENTRY.name: MVP_SMALL_AREA
ENTRY.STRING: Indicates the most valuable player (on each team for a team game, or overall for a non-team game). A "weighted" score is used to determine the most valuable player; the combat score counts four times its normal value, the territory score counts double, and the City and Economy scores only count half. Winning players' MVP weights are doubled, and other players who survive until the end of the game have their scores increased by 25%.

ENTRY.name: GAME TIME
ENTRY.STRING: The amount of time the game was played.

ENTRY.name: MAP TYPE
ENTRY.STRING: The type of map used in the game.

ENTRY.name: HIGH SCORE
ENTRY.STRING: The highest score in the game.

ENTRY.name: VICTORY TYPE
ENTRY.STRING: How the game was won or lost.

ENTRY.name: SUPPLY_DEPOT
ENTRY.STRING: This territory contains a Supply Center. You will gain a new army on the strategic map.

ENTRY.name: SUPPLY_DEPOTX
ENTRY.STRING: This territory does not contain a Supply Center. Supply Centers give you a new army on the strategic map.

ENTRY.name: TRIBUTE
ENTRY.STRING: This territory gives you a +$NUM0 Tribute bonus. This will be added to your treasury.

ENTRY.name: TRIBUTEX
ENTRY.STRING: This territory does not contain a Tribute bonus. Tribute bonuses are added to your treasury after capturing certain territories.

ENTRY.name: RARE_RESOURCE
ENTRY.STRING: This territory contains $RARERES0. You will gain its benefits in future battles as long as you own this territory.

ENTRY.name: RARE_RESOURCEX
ENTRY.STRING: This territory contains no Rare Resources. Capturing Rare Resources gives you their benefits in future battles.

ENTRY.name: BONUS_CARD_STRAT
ENTRY.STRING: You have gained a $BONUSCARDNAME0 Strategic Bonus Card. Click on this card from the stragic map interface and select a territory to place it in.

ENTRY.name: BONUS_CARD_TAC
ENTRY.STRING: You have gained a $BONUSCARDNAME0 Bonus Card. You will be able to play it to your advantage on the tactical card selection screen after choosing to begin a battle.

ENTRY.name: BONUS_CARDX
ENTRY.STRING: This territory does not contain a Bonus Card. Captured bonus cards can be played to your advantage on the strategic map or before a battle.

ENTRY.name: ACHIEVEMENTS
ENTRY.STRING: Click to view your achievements in this battle.

ENTRY.name: QUIT
ENTRY.STRING: Click to continue to the Strategic Map.

ENTRY.name: EXAMINE_MAP
ENTRY.STRING: Click to examine the map.

ENTRY.name: PEACE
ENTRY.STRING: Click to request a peace treaty or alliance with another nation.

ENTRY.name: CLOSE
ENTRY.STRING: Click to exit the Diplomacy screen.

ENTRY.name: WAR
ENTRY.STRING: Click to declare war on another nation.

ENTRY.name: TERRITORY
ENTRY.STRING: Click to attempt to buy territory from another nation.

ENTRY.name: TRIBUTE_BUTTON
ENTRY.STRING: Tribute is gained when a territory is conquered. Use Tribute to purchase bonus cards, increase territory strength, and make diplomatic deals.

ENTRY.name: WORLD_STATUS
ENTRY.STRING: Click to display World Status screen.

ENTRY.name: NEGOTIATE
ENTRY.STRING: Click to negotiate.

ENTRY.name: START
ENTRY.STRING: Click to begin the battle.

ENTRY.name: CENTER
ENTRY.STRING: Click to center the map over the disputed territory.

ENTRY.name: BRIBE
ENTRY.STRING: Click to offer a bribe to these invaders in exchange for their withdrawal from your territory. They will be unable to attack you for a period of time.

ENTRY.name: QUIT
ENTRY.STRING: Click to save and quit this campaign. You can continue your campaign from the Conquer the World setup screen.

ENTRY.name: CLOSE
ENTRY.STRING: Click to close the World Status screen.

ENTRY.name: NEXT
ENTRY.STRING: Click to see the next page of the World Status screen.

ENTRY.name: COLUMN1
ENTRY.STRING: Displays the name of each nation's leader.

ENTRY.name: COLUMN0
ENTRY.STRING: Displays the rank for each nation.

ENTRY.name: COLUMN2
ENTRY.STRING: Displays the name of each nation.

ENTRY.name: COLUMN3
ENTRY.STRING: Displays the percentage of the world under each nation's control.

ENTRY.name: COLUMN4
ENTRY.STRING: Displays the number of territories under each nation's control.

ENTRY.name: COLUMN5
ENTRY.STRING: Displays the number of armies controlled by each nation.

ENTRY.name: COLUMN6
ENTRY.STRING: Displays the amount of Tribute in each nation's treasury.

ENTRY.name: COLUMN7
ENTRY.STRING: Displays each nation's diplomatic stance towards you.

ENTRY.name: COLUMN8
ENTRY.STRING: Displays each nation's attitude towards you.

ENTRY.name: COLONIES
ENTRY.STRING: Click to display the statistics and information about the current state of the colonies in the world.

ENTRY.name: STATS
ENTRY.STRING: Click to display the statistics and information about the current state of the world.

ENTRY.name: COLONY_COLUMN4
ENTRY.STRING: Displays the rare resources located in each colony.

ENTRY.name: COLONY_COLUMN3
ENTRY.STRING: Displays the Wonder located in each colony.

ENTRY.name: COLONY_COLUMN0
ENTRY.STRING: Displays the name of each colony.

ENTRY.name: COLONY_COLUMN1
ENTRY.STRING: Displays the name of the nation that controls each colony.

ENTRY.name: COLONY_COLUMN2
ENTRY.STRING: Displays the amount of Tribute income per turn received from each colony.

ENTRY.name: TAB_PURCHASE
ENTRY.STRING: Click this tab to display items purchased like Bonus Cards or Territory Strength Upgrades.

ENTRY.name: TAB_DIPLOMACY
ENTRY.STRING: Click this tab to display diplomatic actions like declarations of war or peace treaties.

ENTRY.name: TAB_CONQUEST
ENTRY.STRING: Click this tab to display successful invasions.

ENTRY.name: TAB_CARD
ENTRY.STRING: Click this tab to display strategic Bonus Cards played

ENTRY.name: CLOSE
ENTRY.STRING: Click this button to close the World Events window.

ENTRY.name: TAB_DEFENSE
ENTRY.STRING: Click this tab to display successful defenses against invasions

ENTRY.name: ARROW_UP
ENTRY.STRING: Click this button to scroll up to see previous events.

ENTRY.name: ARROW_DOWN
ENTRY.STRING: Click this button to scroll down to see more events.

ENTRY.name: ITEM_BUT
ENTRY.STRING: Click to center the map on this event.

ENTRY.name: AUTO_SHOW
ENTRY.STRING: Display the World Events screen automatically each turn.

ENTRY.name: CANCEL
ENTRY.STRING: Click to cancel this Bonus Card purchase.

ENTRY.name: OKAY
ENTRY.STRING: Click to confirm your Bonus Card selection.

ENTRY.name: CARD
ENTRY.STRING: Click to select this Bonus Card for purchase.

ENTRY.name: OPP_CARD_RIGHT
ENTRY.STRING: Click to display your opponent's additional bonus cards.

ENTRY.name: CLOSE
ENTRY.STRING: Click to begin the battle.

ENTRY.name: OPP_CARD_LEFT
ENTRY.STRING: Click to display your opponent's additional bonus cards.

ENTRY.name: PLAYER_CARD_RIGHT
ENTRY.STRING: Click to display your additional bonus cards.

ENTRY.name: PLAYER_CARD_LEFT
ENTRY.STRING: Click to display your additional bonus cards.

ENTRY.name: INTRO
ENTRY.STRING: Click to return to the scenario introduction.

ENTRY.name: INFO
ENTRY.STRING: Click to view additional historical information about this scenario.

ENTRY.name: DESC
ENTRY.STRING: Displays the type of battle you are about to fight and the victory conditions.

ENTRY.name: PLAYER_ALLY
ENTRY.STRING: Allied reinforcements are displayed here. Any allied army stationed in an adjacent territory will support an attack. A supporting allied army sends citizens to construct cities, buildings, and troops to aid in your conquest.

ENTRY.name: PLAYER_REINFORCE
ENTRY.STRING: Expected reinforcements are displayed here. Any friendly army stationed in an adjacent territory will support an attack. A supporting army sends reinforcements during the battle.

ENTRY.name: PLAYER_NAME
ENTRY.STRING: Displays player name and nation.

ENTRY.name: OPP_CARD
ENTRY.STRING: $CARDNAME0$CARDDESC1

ENTRY.name: OPP_ALLY
ENTRY.STRING: Enemy allied reinforcements are displayed here. Any allied army stationed in an adjacent territory will support an attack. A supporting ally army sends citizens who construct cities, buildings, and troops.

ENTRY.name: OPP_REINFORCE
ENTRY.STRING: Your enemy's expected reinforcements are displayed here. Any enemy army stationed in an adjacent territory will support an attack. A supporting army sends reinforcements during the battle.

ENTRY.name: OPP_NAME
ENTRY.STRING: Displays your opponent's name and nation.

ENTRY.name: PLAYER_CARD
ENTRY.STRING: $CARDNAME0$CARDDESC1

ENTRY.name: CLOSE
ENTRY.STRING: Click to begin the Conquer the World campaign.

ENTRY.name: MORE
ENTRY.STRING: Click to view additional historical information about this Conquer the World campaign.

ENTRY.name: BONUS_CARD
ENTRY.STRING: A skill bonus card is awarded when you win a Field Battle or Tactics scenario. The amount of the bonus depends on how many of your troops have survived the battle.

ENTRY.name: QUIT
ENTRY.STRING: Click to continue.

ENTRY.name: CLOSE
ENTRY.STRING: Click to return to the strategic map.

ENTRY.name: MENU
ENTRY.STRING: Click to quit to the main menu.

ENTRY.name: VICTORY
ENTRY.STRING: One by one, you have vanquished your enemies and united all the nations under your glorious banner! Throughout the ages your name will be remembered as the one who succeeded where all others have failed -- you have conquered the world.

ENTRY.name: DEFEAT
ENTRY.STRING: After a valiant defense, your nation was overcome in an apocalyptic final battle. Although you fought bravely, the enemy has carried the day. Your people wait for you to rise from the ashes and make another attempt to conquer the world.

ENTRY.name: MARGINAL_VICTORY
ENTRY.STRING: Under your leadership, the $TRIBE0 have become the largest and most prosperous nation on the planet. With the Ages at an end, you have earned the respect of your foes and the adulation of your people for this momentous accomplishment. However, complete conquest of all the nations must await another attempt, as a few countries managed to hold out against your might.

ENTRY.name: MARGINAL_DEFEAT
ENTRY.STRING: With the Ages at an end, you have enjoyed some modest success at expansion and conquest. Your enemies know you as a worthy foe, and your people are grateful for your leadership. However, other nations outshine you in wealth and size, and the dream of global conquest remains for you to attempt again.

ENTRY.name: ARMAGEDDON
ENTRY.STRING: You and your countrymen boldly led the way into the Modern Age. You believed that the only thing more powerful than your science and your weapons was your own will and power to control nature. Humanity has paid the ultimate price for your recklessness.

ENTRY.name: ALLIED
ENTRY.STRING: Your careful planning and endless patience have led to a planet united in alliance. Eschewing the bloodthirsty goals of tyrants, you have pursued peaceful ends that have earned you and your nation immense respect and trust. Though many battles were fought to achieve it, the world's people can celebrate the great alliance that has brought them peace and prosperity.

ENTRY.name: ALLIED_NUKE
ENTRY.STRING: They said that there are no winners in a global thermonuclear war. Were they right? All that is certain is that you are alive and your enemies, their children, their land, and any trace that they ever existed are gone. If that suits you, then lead your people in celebration of their great victory.

ENTRY.name: NUKE_DEFEAT
ENTRY.STRING: Did you ever really believe that this could happen? Was there no possible way to prevent it? In the end, it doesn't matter who launched the missiles. Sure, a few of your enemies survived to write the history of this pathetic display of ego—but even they may come to feel that the dead are the lucky ones in the aftermath of this war.

ENTRY.name: CONTINUED_VICTORY
ENTRY.STRING: Though the Ages came to an end, the goal of world conquest seemed temptingly close, and you chose to continue your ascent to power. You have succeeded in your quest, and although the task took more time than expected, the people united under your banner are grateful for your perseverance.

ENTRY.name: CONTINUED_ALLIED_VICTORY
ENTRY.STRING: Though the Ages came to an end, the goal of world conquest seemed temptingly close, and you chose to continue your ascent to power. Under the auspices of a global confederation, your persistence has paid a handsome dividend as you and your allies now rule the globe in partnership.

ENTRY.name: HERO_DEFEAT
ENTRY.STRING: Your fearless bravado inspired your troops to perform feats that will be lauded for generations. Your enemies, however, will chuckle in their old age about your simple-minded charge into mortal danger. Perishing on the field of battle never helped anyone become ruler of the world.

ENTRY.name: SAVE_GAME
ENTRY.STRING: Save the current game or scenario.

ENTRY.name: OPTIONS
ENTRY.STRING: Click to modify your options and preferences.

ENTRY.name: RETURN_TO_GAME
ENTRY.STRING: Return to the current game or scenario.

ENTRY.name: LOAD_GAME
ENTRY.STRING: Click to load a saved game or scenario.

ENTRY.name: SHOW_TIPS
ENTRY.STRING: Show game tips.

ENTRY.name: QUIT
ENTRY.STRING: Quit the current game.

ENTRY.name: ACHIEVEMENTS
ENTRY.STRING: View the achievements for this game or scenario.

ENTRY.name: RESIGN_GAME
ENTRY.STRING: Resign from the current game or scenario.

ENTRY.name: QUITCAMPAIGN
ENTRY.STRING: Quit the Conquer the World campaign.

ENTRY.name: RETURN_TO_GAME
ENTRY.STRING: Return to the current game.

ENTRY.name: SAVE_GAME
ENTRY.STRING: Save the current game.

ENTRY.name: LOAD_GAME
ENTRY.STRING: Click to load a saved game.

ENTRY.name: GAME_OPTIONS
ENTRY.STRING: Click to modify your player profile and options.

ENTRY.name: QUIT
ENTRY.STRING: Quit the current campaign.

ENTRY.name: ACHIEVEMENTS
ENTRY.STRING: Click to view your achievements in this battle.

ENTRY.name: SHOW_HINTS
ENTRY.STRING: Click to re-enable popup hints.

ENTRY.name: CLOSE
ENTRY.STRING: Close the tips.

ENTRY.name: PREVTIP
ENTRY.STRING: Show the previous tip.

ENTRY.name: NEXTTIP
ENTRY.STRING: Show the next tip.

ENTRY.name: SHOWTIPS
ENTRY.STRING: Check this box to have tips shown at the start of each game.
Message from the $TRIBENAME0: You are merely an inconvenient bump in our road to world domination. Prepare to be crushed beneath the wheels of our great war machine!
Message from the $TRIBENAME0: When the history of this world is written, your nation will be an insignificant footnote. Marvel upon our approaching armies, and despair!
Message from the $TRIBENAME0: I hope you have enjoyed your season in the sun. The future is ours, and it begins now!

Message from the $TRIBENAME0: You have played a small part in this world's drama, but your time is at an end. The choice before you: an honorable death, or ignoble surrender. Decide now what your fate is to be!
Message from the $TRIBENAME0: We have had enough of your strongman's ways. Go to the battlefield and await your well-deserved destiny!
Message from the $TRIBENAME0: Your grand pretensions to empire have come to naught. Flee to your strongholds and sustain yourselves on your arrogance!
Message from the $TRIBENAME0: The thuggish brigands you call an army have despoiled enough of this world. Your villainous nation must be crushed before it is too late!

Message from the $TRIBENAME0: We have heard the lamentations of your people, and we come to save them from your benighted rule. Your armies are sure to desert your cause in the face of our overwhelming might!
Message from the $TRIBENAME0: Like all of history's would-be despots, your reach has exceeded your grasp. You are now destined to join them in the annals of mediocrity!
Message from the $TRIBENAME0: We have endured your imperial charades for long enough. Let us see if your bravado extends to the battlefield!
Message from the $TRIBENAME0: Your meager talents at generalship have carried your nation surprisingly far. However, the time has come for a lesson in wielding true power!
Message from the $TRIBENAME0: Your bungling attempts at conquest grow less amusing with time. We have had enough of your foolishness!

ENTRY.name: IGNORE_LIST
ENTRY.STRING: Shows the list of players you are currently ignoring.

ENTRY.name: CLOSE
ENTRY.STRING: Click to close this window.

ENTRY.name: CONTINENT
ENTRY.STRING: You have united $CONTINENT0 under your wise rule. For this accomplishment you have gained a bonus of $NUM0 tribute.

ENTRY.name: CAPITAL
ENTRY.STRING: You have conquered the $TRIBE0. Never again will their treacherous schemes plague your nation. Plunder from their empire has enriched your treasury by $NUM0 Tribute.

ENTRY.name: DEFENSE
ENTRY.STRING: You have beaten back the enemy offensive! In the retreat, your foe was forced to abandon stockpiles of military stores worth $NUM0 tribute. That amount has been added to your treasury.

ENTRY.name: WONDER
ENTRY.STRING: You have constructed the $blah0! This Wonder of the World will be a testament to your glory for all the ages. The powers granted by this Wonder will activate in any Conquest battle when you research $NUM0 Civics technologies.

ENTRY.name: CANCEL
ENTRY.STRING: Click to cancel all changes and leave this screen.

ENTRY.name: ALL_OFF
ENTRY.STRING: Click to deselect all checkboxes. You may then check individual settings in order to show games with those settings.

ENTRY.name: ALL_ON
ENTRY.STRING: Click to select all checkboxes. This means that every game will be visible.

ENTRY.name: OKAY
ENTRY.STRING: Click to accept changes and close this screen.

ENTRY.name: FLAG
ENTRY.STRING: {NO PASSWORD}: Click to search for games that do not require a password.

ENTRY.name: RANKED
ENTRY.STRING: Click to filter out unranked games.

ENTRY.name: TUT_CHOICES
ENTRY.STRING: This box lists the available options that you may want to explore if the tutorials are too easy or difficult for you.

ENTRY.name: OK
ENTRY.STRING: Click here to confirm your selection.

ENTRY.name: OKAY
ENTRY.STRING: Click to build the selected wonder.

ENTRY.name: CANCEL
ENTRY.STRING: Click to cancel.

ENTRY.name: EXAMINE_MAP
ENTRY.STRING: Click to hide the end game menu and view the entire map.

ENTRY.name: ACHIEVEMENTS
ENTRY.STRING: Click to view the performance and achievements of the players in the game.

ENTRY.name: VIEW_PLAYBACK
ENTRY.STRING: Click to watch a playback of the game.

ENTRY.name: QUIT
ENTRY.STRING: Click to return to the main menu.

ENTRY.name: QUIT_CTW
ENTRY.STRING: Click to return to the strategic map.

ENTRY.name: GAME_REPORT
ENTRY.STRING: Click to see game report.

ENTRY.name: SEND2
ENTRY.STRING: Type your message here.

ENTRY.name: SEND
ENTRY.STRING: Click to send your message.

ENTRY.name: CLOSE
ENTRY.STRING: Click to close this chat window.

ENTRY.name: MINIMIZE
ENTRY.STRING: Click to minimize this chat window.

ENTRY.name: MAXIMIZE
ENTRY.STRING: Click to open this private conversation. Flashes when you receive a new message.

ENTRY.name: IGNORE
ENTRY.STRING: Click to add the selected person to your "Ignore" list. You will not see any messages from someone on your "Ignore" list.

ENTRY.name: ADD
ENTRY.STRING: Click to add the selected person to your Buddy List.

ENTRY.name: ADD
ENTRY.STRING: Searches for a matching Buddy and sends that player a request to add them to your Buddy List. If they accept, they will be added to your Buddy List.

ENTRY.name: CANCEL
ENTRY.STRING: Closes this dialog without searching for a Buddy.

ENTRY.name: NICK
ENTRY.STRING: Enter the nickname of the player you would like to add to your Buddy List. You may enter just the nickname if you don't know that player's email address.

ENTRY.name: EMAIL
ENTRY.STRING: Enter the email of the player you would like to add to your Buddy List. If the email has multiple nicknames, enter the specific nickname below OR click the Add button to see the list of the nicknames attached to this email.

ENTRY.name: CLOSE
ENTRY.STRING: Click here to close this window.

ENTRY.name: DELETE
ENTRY.STRING: Click here to remove the selected ignored player from your ignore list. This will allow you to send and receive messages with this player.

ENTRY.name: IGNORED_PLAYERS
ENTRY.STRING: This a list of players that you have current set to ignore. You can select one from the list and press "Remove from List" to be able to communicate with them again.

ENTRY.name: PASSWORD
ENTRY.STRING: Enter your password here.

ENTRY.name: CANCEL
ENTRY.STRING: Click to cancel.

ENTRY.name: OKAY
ENTRY.STRING: Click to submit your password.

ENTRY.name: SEND
ENTRY.STRING: To chat to other players in this room, type a message here and click the Send button.

ENTRY.name: START
ENTRY.STRING: Click to find your opponents and start playing.

ENTRY.name: INVITE
ENTRY.STRING: Click to invite players that are in the QuickMatch Lobby to be your team mate.

ENTRY.name: SWITCH
ENTRY.STRING: Click to enter the Lobby. From the Lobby, you can host an unrated game with any game settings.

ENTRY.name: QUIT
ENTRY.STRING: Click to exit matchmaking.

ENTRY.name: LEAVE
ENTRY.STRING: Clear the entries of people invited to play.

ENTRY.name: SEND
ENTRY.STRING: Click to send a chat message to the other players in this room.

ENTRY.name: IGNORE_LIST
ENTRY.STRING: Shows the list of players that you are currently ignoring.

ENTRY.name: REMOVE
ENTRY.STRING: Click to remove the currently selected person from your Buddy List.

ENTRY.name: ADD
ENTRY.STRING: Click to add someone to your Buddy List.

ENTRY.name: FAVOR_BUDDIES
ENTRY.STRING: Check this box to make it more likely that the people you play are those on your Buddy List.

ENTRY.name: RATED
ENTRY.STRING: Check this box to play rated games against your opponents.

ENTRY.name: STRICT_MATCHING
ENTRY.STRING: Check this box to match only games that exactly match your preferences. If this box is not checked, an effort is made to match you quickly with other players even if your preferences do not match precisely.

ENTRY.name: PREVENT_HOSTING
ENTRY.STRING: Check this box if you do not want your machine to ever act as the host machine. Try using this option if you are having trouble playing Quick Match.

ENTRY.name: TRIBE
ENTRY.STRING: Click to select the nation you will play.

ENTRY.name: GAME_RULES
ENTRY.STRING: Click to select the game rules you prefer.

ENTRY.name: TEAM_STYLE
ENTRY.STRING: Click to select which team style you prefer.

ENTRY.name: MAP_STYLE
ENTRY.STRING: Click to select the map style that you prefer.

ENTRY.name: NUM_PLAYERS
ENTRY.STRING: Click to select the number of players you prefer.

ENTRY.name: TEAM_STYLE0
ENTRY.STRING: {No Preference}: Select this option if you do not care which team style will be used. Specifying fewer preferences may increase the speed at which you are matched with opponents.

ENTRY.name: TEAM_STYLE1
ENTRY.STRING: {1v1}: Select this option if you want to play against a single opponent.

ENTRY.name: TEAM_STYLE2
ENTRY.STRING: {2v2}: Select this option if you want to play in a team game with two players on each side.

ENTRY.name: TEAM_STYLE3
ENTRY.STRING: {3v3}: Select this option if you want to play in a team game with three players on each side.

ENTRY.name: TEAM_STYLE4
ENTRY.STRING: {4v4}: Select this option if you want to play in a team game with four players on each side.

ENTRY.name: TEAM_STYLE5
ENTRY.STRING: {Assassin}: Select this option if you want to play in an Assassin game with two or more players, in which each player is given a target nation and is rewarded for eliminating it.

ENTRY.name: TEAM_STYLE6
ENTRY.STRING: {Free for All}: Select this option if you want to play in a free-for-all, in which three or more nations war for supremacy.

ENTRY.name: TEAM_STYLE7
ENTRY.STRING: {Diplomacy}: Select this option if you want to play in a Diplomacy game, in which three or more nations vie for supremacy but can negotiate alliances and peace treaties.

ENTRY.name: GAME_RULES0
ENTRY.STRING: {No Preference}: Select this option if you do not care which game rules will be used. Specifying fewer preferences may increase the speed at which you are matched with opponents.

ENTRY.name: GAME_RULES1
ENTRY.STRING: {Standard}: Select this option to play with the standard game rules. You win by conquering your opponents, building Wonders, or controlling 70% of the world's territory.

ENTRY.name: GAME_RULES2
ENTRY.STRING: {Military Standard}: Select this option to play with Military game rules. You win by conquering your opponents or controlling 80% of the world's territory. No Wonder victory is permitted.

ENTRY.name: GAME_RULES3
ENTRY.STRING: {Deathmatch}: Select this option to play in a Deathmatch. Players begin in the Ancient Age with a massive supply of each resource.

ENTRY.name: GAME_RULES4
ENTRY.STRING: {Info Age Deathmatch}: Select this option to play in an Information Age Deathmatch. Players begin with all standard technologies researched and a massive supply of each resource. No nuclear weapons or future technologies are allowed.

ENTRY.name: GAME_RULES5
ENTRY.STRING: {No Rush}: Select this option to play in a No Rush game. Standard rules are used but players begin at peace and cannot attack one another until someone reaches the Gunpowder Age.

ENTRY.name: MAPSTYLES0
ENTRY.STRING: Select this option if you do not care which map style will be used. Specifying fewer preferences may increase the speed at which you are matched with opponents.

ENTRY.name: MAX_RATING
ENTRY.STRING: Click to select the maximum average rating of your opponents.

ENTRY.name: MIN_RATING
ENTRY.STRING: Click to select the minimum average rating of your opponents.

ENTRY.name: PLAYERS
ENTRY.STRING: Click to select a player from the list of available players online. Double-clicking will invite that player to be your teammate and close the window.

ENTRY.name: INVITE
ENTRY.STRING: Click to invite the selected player to be your teammate for this game.

ENTRY.name: CANCEL
ENTRY.STRING: Click to close this window and not invite any teammates.

ENTRY.name: QUICKMATCH
ENTRY.STRING: Click to set up a rated Quick Match game (recommended). You will automatically be matched with other players based on the type of game you prefer and the skill levels of the players looking for games.

ENTRY.name: LOBBY
ENTRY.STRING: Click to enter the Lobby. From the Lobby, you can host an unrated game with any game settings you like, or you can join a game that another player is hosting.

ENTRY.name: CHOICE_SPOT0
ENTRY.STRING: Click to set up a Quick Match game (recommended). You will automatically be matched with other players based on the type of game you prefer and the skill levels of the players looking for games.

ENTRY.name: CHOICE_SPOT1
ENTRY.STRING: Click to enter the Lobby. From the Lobby, you can host a game with any game settings you like, or you can join a game that another player is hosting.

AWAY.ENTRY: Toggles your away status. Players who message you directly while you are away will be told that you are not available.

BROADCAST.ENTRY: Send a message from inside the staging room to the lobby channel chat
Ex: /b Hey everyone come join my game!

EMOTE.ENTRY: Sends an action message to the chat.

FRIENDS.ENTRY: Accesses the various friend mangement commands
- list - Lists all known friends (alias l)
- add {name} - Adds a friend to buddy list (alias a)
- msg {message} - Sends a message to all friends (alias m)
/f m Want to play a game?

UNIGNORE.ENTRY: Allow messages to be received from a user

WHISPER.ENTRY: Send private message to a user.
Ex: /w BHG_Masta Want to play a game?

WHO.ENTRY: List users in the current channel.

WHOIS.ENTRY: List player's online/offline status, where they are, and what they are doing.

REJOIN.ENTRY: Resets the user to receive staging room chat only

HELP.ENTRY: Here is a list of the available chat commands.
Type /help {command} to get help with a particular command.

ENTRY.name: COLONY_OPP_OFF
ENTRY.STRING: Colonies offered for exchange. Colonies are not present on the map, but can provide rare resources, tribute, and wonders.

ENTRY.name: COLONY_PLAYER
ENTRY.STRING: Colonies available to offer. Colonies are not present on the map, but can provide rare resources, tribute, and wonders.

ENTRY.name: TERRITORY_PLAYER
ENTRY.STRING: Territories available to offer.

ENTRY.name: COLONY_PLAYER_OFF
ENTRY.STRING: Colonies offered for exchange. Colonies are not present on the map, but can provide rare resources, tribute, and wonders.

ENTRY.name: TERRITORY_PLAYER_OFF
ENTRY.STRING: Territories offered for exchange.

ENTRY.STRING: Territories available to request.

ENTRY.name: COLONY_OPP
ENTRY.STRING: Colonies available to request. Colonies are not present on the map, but can provide rare resources, tribute, and wonders.

ENTRY.name: ALLY

ENTRY.name: EXCHANGE
ENTRY.STRING: Click to propose the current deal as a trade.

ENTRY.name: VASSAL
ENTRY.STRING: Click to propose the current deal as an agreement to vassalage. When a nation is your vassal, you control their armies and territory but do not gain rare resources or tribute.

ENTRY.name: CLOSE
ENTRY.STRING: Click to close this window and cancel the current offer.

ENTRY.STRING: Click to add the selected card to the offer.

ENTRY.STRING: Click to add the selected colony to the offer.

ENTRY.name: OPP_TRIB_MINUS

ENTRY.STRING: Click to directly enter an amount of tribute.

ENTRY.name: RESET

ENTRY.name: OKAY
ENTRY.STRING: Click to close the Advisor screen.

ENTRY.name: CANCEL
ENTRY.STRING: Click to close this window leave the current Twitch settings unchanged.

ENTRY.name: START
ENTRY.STRING: Click to Start or Pause the Stream

ENTRY.name: LOGIN
ENTRY.STRING: Click to Log in or out of the Twitch Servers.

ENTRY.name: ENABLE_CHAT
ENTRY.STRING: Click if you'd like to receive Twitch chat messages in game.

ENTRY.name: ENABLE_CAMERA
ENTRY.STRING: Click to show your webcam as part of the stream.

ENTRY.name: RESOLUTIONS
ENTRY.STRING: Click to set the desired Twitch stream output resolution.

ENTRY.name: PASSWORD_BOX
ENTRY.STRING: Type the password you use to log onto Twitch. Press ENTER or click the Log in button to connect to Twitch when you have typed all your information

ENTRY.name: USERNAME_BOX
ENTRY.STRING: Type the username you use to log onto Twitch. Press ENTER or click the Log in button to connect to Twitch when you have typed all your information

ENTRY.name: LISTBOX-FILELIST
ENTRY.STRING: A complete list of all files contained within selected mod.

ENTRY.name: LISTBOX-INSTALLEDMODS
ENTRY.STRING: A list of installed mods. Mods that are yellow are 'drop down' mods and are not normally active. You can only activate a drop down mod when creating a game to be used during that one game. White mods are active all the time, but you must be careful that they do not contain data files that could trigger desyncs versus other players that do not have the same mod. Please report any mods that create desyncs on the Steam forums or workshop comments area.

ENTRY.name: LISTBOX-TAGLIST
ENTRY.STRING: Selected mod has the following Steam tags. Note that Steam Tags are automatically calculated based on contents.

ENTRY.name: BTN-BACK
ENTRY.STRING: Return to main menu.

ENTRY.name: BTN-UNSUBSCRIBE
ENTRY.STRING: Unsubscribe to selected mod. It will remove associated files from your system. You cannot unsubscribe to mods of your own creation.

ENTRY.name: BTN-PRIORITYUP
ENTRY.STRING: Increase the priority of this mod so this mod's files will be found before mods listed below it.

ENTRY.name: BTN-ENABLETOGGLE
ENTRY.STRING: Enable or disable this mod.

ENTRY.name: BTN-PUBLISHMOD
ENTRY.STRING: Proceed to the publish screen where you may finalize certain details before publishing your mod to the world. If this mod has already been published, then it'll automatically update the mod instead and increment its version. You can only publish local mods.

ENTRY.name: BTN-PRIORITYDOWN
ENTRY.STRING: Decrease the priority of this mod so this mod's files will be found only if mods above it don't have a particular file.

ENTRY.name: BTN-OPENDIRECTORY
ENTRY.STRING: Opens the location of this mod in a file explorer window.

ENTRY.name: BTN-RELOADASSETS
ENTRY.STRING: Restart the game locking in any changes you made.

ENTRY.name: MOD MANAGER
ENTRY.STRING: Here is where you can adjust priorities, enable, disable, publish, and unsubscribe to mods. Certain operations require a game restart.

ENTRY.name: DESC
ENTRY.STRING: Enter your description for this mod. This text will be visible in the Steam workshop outside of Rise of Nations.

ENTRY.name: BTN-PUBLISH
ENTRY.STRING: Publish (or update) your mod now by uploading the files to the Steam Workshop.

ENTRY.name: BTN-CANCEL
ENTRY.STRING: Return to Mod Manager.

ENTRY.name: COMBO-VISIBILITY
ENTRY.STRING: Text needed for PUBLISHWIN/COMBOBOX/COMBO-VISIBILITY in help.xml!

ENTRY.name: BTN-OK
ENTRY.STRING: Return to Mod Manager.
